The '''Imperial Department for Epidemic Prevention''' hired hunters on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] wild creatures that were suspected to be carrying [[Droch/Legends|droch]] [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] in order to prevent an outbreak of [[Death Seed]] there in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].<ref name="SWG:TDSD" /> It is unknown what their relationship was to the [[Imperial medical service]], which also worked to combat plagues.
